title: Quark VRO - Subtler Shields
description: Subtler shields from Quark VRO now in a standalone pack
body:
![Shields, now subtler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f943ccd054db82942c94c58ef362211f9efbfec8_0.webp)

Taken directly from **[Quark VRO](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quark-vro)**, **Subtler Shields** is a small resource pack that will increase your quality of life by making your shields appear much lower in first person, increasing visibility, **_while leaving their appearance otherwise untouched_**. This feature is also included in Quark VRO, using them both at the same time is not needed.

_This the standalone version of a feature from the pack, for entirety of Quark VRO go [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quark-vro)._

_For any issues with the pack or feature requests, go [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/subtler-shields/issues)._


_Permission from Vazkii, Quark's creator, to create this resource pack is in Quark VRO's Gallery section._

### [Join Violet Moon's Discord!](https://discord.gg/vm)
